$comment: Production escape-hatch budget baseline. Counts are line-grep directional totals (see scripts/quality/escape-hatch-budget.mjs header + docs/TYPESCRIPT_QUALITY_AUDIT_2026.md policy section). production.<category> is a CEILING: the gate fails if the live count exceeds it. Bump a ceiling DOWN as you remove escapes; bump it UP only with a reviewed justification. test.<category> is informational.
generated_methodology: grep -rnE <pattern> src packages/wft-router/src --include=*.ts, split by test-path fragments (.test.ts/.spec.ts/.property.test.ts/.bench.ts/__tests__/).
